arts.ttl: McGuiness declares debut season at Luton has been his 'toughest' but 'best'
arts.sum: Centre half hails the group he has joined at Kenilworth Road

arts.ttl: Challenge set for Middlesbrough's January signings after underwhelming starts - Eric Paylor
arts.sum: Mark Travers is a good shot stopper and merits his place, but the fact that Kelechi Iheanacho, Samuel Iling-Junior and Ryan Giles are struggling for pitch time indicates that they need to produce more, both on the training ground and on match days. Middlesbrough need to see a lot more from the January new boys if the team is to generate consistency of performance in the run-in.

arts.ttl: Luton Town man wanted on permanent basis by League One side this summer
arts.sum: Luton Town midfielder Pelly Ruddock Mpanzu is wanted by Rotherham United on a permanent basis, their boss Steve… The post Luton Town man wanted on permanent basis by League One side this summer appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Jonny Howson's Middlesbrough future role explored as Carrick reflects on personal experience
arts.sum: Michael Carrick knows when needed he can call upon Jonny Howson at centre-back, but appeared to rule it out as a longer-term role for the Middlesbrough skipper. Asked if he found playing centre-back easier, the Boro boss added: “I don’t think it’s easier, it’s just different.

arts.ttl: Clark felt Luton finally showed some much-needed character during Cardiff victory
arts.sum: Hatters bit back from a goal down to beat Bluebirds

arts.ttl: HATTERS RATED: Cardiff City 1 Luton Town 2
arts.sum: Luton secure precious three points on the road

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough injury update for Luton Town as Carrick makes dilemma admission ahead of break
arts.sum: Though Michael Carrick is not completely writing off the chance of Middlesbrough welcoming back a centre-back for Saturday’s trip to Luton Town, the Boro boss admits it looks unlikely at this stage. We’re still hopeful, but we’ll see what the next couple of days bring.
